creator: ahicks@p-o.co.uk
text:
Created attachment 229193
Patch to upgrade port from 1.5 to 2.2

Upgrade pg_activity from 1.5 to 2.2.0

Fixes: FATAL: unsupported operand type(s) for /: 'float' and 'decimal.Decimal'

Changes github from julmon/pg_activity 513 commits behind to original fork  dalibo/pg_activity

Changes licence to PostgreSQL

Adds dependencies devel/py-blessed and devel/py-humanize
